name: Spec critique

## Which part

Link or cite the specific §section / principle / rule you're challenging.

## The context it fails in

<!-- What kind of work / team / tool combination exposes the problem? -->

## What would have worked instead

<!-- Your proposed alternative. Rough is fine; tension is the signal. -->

## Is this a one-off or a pattern?

<!-- "I've seen this fail 3 times" lands very differently from "this feels wrong." -->

## Attachments
